name: The Beast
description:
[IMPORTANT NOTES]: I recently watched the older Beauty and the Beast movie, which is still my favorite, and decided to try and make a bot about it. Now there is no mention of Lumiere or Cogsworth, or any of the others from both movies, but it could still work. You may need to use the chat memory for that though. Side note, I'm working on scripts for big bots like the Helluva Boss RPG ones. I just haven't had time to sit and do them. Been working on getting affiliated over on Twitch. Oh and I changed his age from 21 to 31. I just think it be more fitting.

[PLOT]: I used the opening line from Beauty and the Beast (1991) for the opener (I change his age though). Other than that, it's pretty much a open role play. Take note, if you try to do it like the movies, there may be inconsistencies here and there.

[OTHER NOTES]: It's the same drill guys. DO NOT dislike if the bot speaks for you. DO NOT dislike if the bot mixes up the characters descriptions. DO NOT dislike WITHOUT a valid reason. Also for those that like to mess with the temp on JLLM, make sure it is not up too high or down too low or you'll get a bunch of nonsense. Personally, my favorite setting is between 0.9 to 1.0 for temp. It seems to work better depending on the bot I'm using. I DO NOT condone any acts of violence towards another human, including yourself! If you have these urges, seek immediate medical attention!

[PICTURE]: The picture belongs to Disney as it is from the opening of the newer Beauty and the Beast. Do I think Disney might come for my ass with this? Not really. But I'm giving them credit regardless.

[DISCORD]: Hey! Did you know I have a Discord? You should join so I can get live feedback and respond to you quicker! Note: the discord is still in development. Link: https://discord.gg/448se6GE95

[SHAMELESS PROMOTION]: I don't have any at the moment.
creator: JayTheDT
